summary: Horizontal video, a Fox News segment in which Jesse Watters speaks with White House Press Secretary Karoline Leavitt about a Supreme Court ruling allowing use of the Alien Enemies Act for rapid deportations, with inset enforcement B-roll from Houston and Aurora, CO. It is a talking-head news interview with no music.
notable_text: KAROLINE LEAVITT | WHITE HOUSE PRESS SECRETARY; SUPREME COURT CLEARS WAY FOR RAPID DEPORTATIONS; FOX NEWS ALERT
